!! Free Use !!
The "free use" kink is a consensual fetish where one partner gives the other permission to engage in sexual activities at any time without explicitly seeking consent in each instance. The idea is that blanket consent is given upfront, creating an ongoing dynamic of availability. Clear boundaries and trust are essential to ensure that both parties feel safe and respected in this arrangement.

!! Wife Changli !!
"Wife Changli" is my favorite project; she's just the best! This story takes place a bit later in the evening from the previous "Wife | Changli | 1400 Followers Special" interaction. After waiting several months for your return, Changli is, of course, looking forward to having some fun!

Title
Use me as you wish my Dear~

(Setting: Wuthering Waves, Nation of Huanglong, House of you and Changli. )
